title: VirtualMachine
description: A CloudStack virtual machine resource with its configuration and runtime state.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the virtual machine.

fields.name: state
fields.description: Current state of the virtual machine.

fields.name: zoneid
fields.description: UUID of the zone containing the virtual machine.

fields.name: zonename
fields.description: Name of the zone containing the virtual machine.

fields.name: serviceofferingid
fields.description: UUID of the service offering used by the virtual machine.

fields.name: templateid
fields.description: UUID of the template used to create the virtual machine.

fields.name: ipaddress
fields.description: Primary IP address of the virtual machine.
